examples: But youth unemployment is rising perniciously across much of the developed world.
Spain's figures are particularly horrendous. But youth unemployment is rising perniciously across much of the developed world.
Jacobson, who insists "sugary soft drinks contribute to obesity"--with caffeine, an ingredient in many sodas, as the perniciously addictive hook.
Perniciously, victimized medical records are altered, introducing risk that a patient could receive harmful medication, be denied insurance or wrongly fail an employee health test and lose a job.
